text.title: llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "Rate this response 1-10" with no rubric, no evidence requirement, no JSON.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Output becomes a function of judge mood, candidate length, and surface fluency rather than the criteria you actually care about.

failure-mode.description: Single-judge production setup with no order swap, no length normalisation, no cross-model verification.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Looks rigorous because there is JSON output and a rubric, but the four biases combine to make the metric a measurement of style, not quality.
